entities.name: CHICKPEA
entities.description: A legume crop studied for its susceptibility to Rhizoctonia bataticola.

entities.name: RHIZOCTONIA BATATICOLA
entities.description: A fungal pathogen, also known as Macrophomina phaseolina, that causes disease in chickpea.

entities.name: SUSCEPTIBILITY
entities.description: The degree to which chickpea cultivars are affected by the pathogen Rhizoctonia bataticola.

entities.name: AGE AT INOCULATION
entities.description: The age of the plant at the time of pathogen exposure, which influences the level of susceptibility.

entities.name: SCREENING
entities.description: The process of evaluating plant cultivars for resistance or susceptibility to a disease.
